UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile with their role in the system.

School.title: School
School.description: Represents the school entity with core information.

id.description: Unique identifier for the School entity.

name.description: The full name of the school.

shortName.description: The short name or abbreviation of the school's name.

address.description: The physical address of the school.

mission.description: The school's mission statement, broken down into points.

principalMessage.description: A welcome message from the principal.

instagramUrl.description: URL for the school's Instagram profile.

tiktokUrl.description: URL for the school's TikTok profile.

facebookUrl.description: URL for the school's Facebook page.

whatsappUrl.description: URL for the school's WhatsApp channel or contact.

youtubeUrl.description: URL for the school's YouTube channel.

NewsArticle.title: NewsArticle
NewsArticle.description: Represents a news article or announcement.

title.description: The title of the news article.

content.description: The main content of the news article.

imageUrl.description: URL of the image associated with the news article.

category.description: The category of the news article (e.g., 'Prestasi', 'Acara').

datePublished.description: The date and time the news article was published.

LiteracyArticle.title: LiteracyArticle
LiteracyArticle.description: Represents a student's written work for the literacy corner.

content.description: The main content of the work.

studentName.description: The name of the student author.

studentClass.description: The class of the student author (e.g., 'XII TKJ 1').

imageUrl.description: URL of an optional image associated with the work.

datePublished.description: The date the work was published.

Major.title: Major
Major.description: Represents a major or field of study at the school.

description.description: A short description of the major.

icon.description: The name of the lucide-react icon to use for the major.

Facility.title: Facility
Facility.description: Represents a facility available at the school.

description.description: A short description of the facility.

imageUrl.description: URL of an image for the facility.

GalleryImage.title: GalleryImage
GalleryImage.description: Represents an image or video in the school's gallery.

imageUrl.description: URL of the gallery image or video.

description.description: A short description or title for the media.

imageHint.description: AI hint for the media content.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the media was added.

name.description: The name of the person who commented.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the comment was submitted.

studentName.description: The full name of the student applying.

chosenMajor.description: The major the student is applying for.

parentPhone.description: Phone number of the student's parent (WhatsApp).

ExtracurricularApplication.title: ExtracurricularApplication
ExtracurricularApplication.description: Represents a student's application for an extracurricular activity.

studentName.description: The full name of the student applying.

studentClass.description: The class of the student applying (e.g., 'X TKJ 1').

extracurricularName.description: The name of the extracurricular activity.

Achievement.title: Achievement
Achievement.description: Represents a student achievement or award.

title.description: The title of the achievement (e.g., 'Juara 1 LKS').

studentName.description: The name of the student(s) who achieved it.

competitionName.description: The name of the competition or event.

dateAchieved.description: The date the achievement was accomplished.

imageUrl.description: URL of an image for the achievement (trophy, student, etc.).

description.description: A short story or description about the achievement.

Testimonial.title: Testimonial
Testimonial.description: Represents a testimonial from a school alumnus.

occupation.description: The current occupation or activity of the alumnus (e.g., 'Software Engineer at Google', 'Kuliah di UGM').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the testimonial was added.

Extracurricular.title: Extracurricular
Extracurricular.description: Represents an extracurricular activity at the school.

name.description: The name of the extracurricular activity.

description.description: A short description of the activity.

icon.description: The name of the lucide-react icon to use.

schedule.description: The schedule for the activity (e.g., 'Setiap hari Sabtu, 10:00-12:00').

GuestbookEntry.title: GuestbookEntry
GuestbookEntry.description: Represents an entry in the school's digital guestbook.

origin.description: The origin of the visitor (e.g., city, institution).

message.description: The message left by the visitor.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the entry was submitted.

Event.title: Event
Event.description: Represents a school event or agenda item.

description.description: A short description of the event.

DownloadableFile.title: DownloadableFile
DownloadableFile.description: Represents a file available for download.

description.description: A short description of the file.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the file was added.

className.description: The name of the class (e.g., 'X TKJ 1').

timeSlot.description: The time slot for the class (e.g., '07:00 - 07:45').

Book.title: Book
Book.description: Represents a book in the school's digital library catalog.

yearPublished.description: The year the book was published.

coverImageUrl.description: URL of the book's cover image.

description.description: A short description or synopsis of the book.

isAvailable.description: Indicates if the book is currently available for borrowing.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the book was added to the catalog.

OsisPost.title: OsisPost
OsisPost.description: Represents an OSIS corner post or announcement.

title.description: The title of the OSIS post.

content.description: The main content of the OSIS post.

imageUrl.description: URL of the image associated with the post.

category.description: The category of the OSIS post (e.g., 'Pengumuman', 'Acara').

datePublished.description: The date and time the post was published.

IndustryPartner.title: IndustryPartner
IndustryPartner.description: Represents an industry partner of the school.

name.description: The name of the company or institution.

description.description: A short description of the partnership.

Teacher.title: Teacher
Teacher.description: Represents a teacher or staff member.

title.description: The teacher's title or subject taught (e.g., 'Guru Matematika', 'Kepala Tata Usaha').

Alumnus.title: Alumnus
Alumnus.description: Represents a single alumnus in the database.

name.description: The full name of the alumnus.

occupation.description: Current occupation or activity (e.g., 'Software Engineer at Google', 'Kuliah di UGM').

JobVacancy.title: JobVacancy
JobVacancy.description: Represents a job vacancy posted in the BKK.

title.description: The title of the job position.

companyName.description: The name of the hiring company.

description.description: A detailed description of the job.

requirements.description: List of requirements for the job.

applyUrl.description: The URL to apply for the job.

postedDate.description: The date the vacancy was posted.

TeachingFactoryProduct.title: TeachingFactoryProduct
TeachingFactoryProduct.description: Represents a product or project from the Teaching Factory.

description.description: A detailed description of the product.

imageUrl.description: URL of an image for the product.

studentCreator.description: The student or class that created the product (e.g., 'XII TKJ 1').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the product was added.

LspCertification.title: LspCertification
LspCertification.description: Represents a certification schema from the LSP.

name.description: The name of the certification schema.

description.description: A short description of the certification.

TracerStudyResponse.title: TracerStudyResponse
TracerStudyResponse.description: Represents a response from an alumnus for the tracer study.

currentActivityDetail.description: Details about the current activity (company name, university, business name, etc.).

suggestions.description: Suggestions or feedback for the school (optional).

GraduationStatus.title: GraduationStatus
GraduationStatus.description: Represents the graduation status of a student for a specific period.

studentIdentifier.description: The unique identifier for the student (e.g., NISN or registration number).

studentName.description: The full name of the student.

notes.description: Optional notes or remarks (e.g., 'Lulus dengan pujian').

Prakerin.title: Prakerin
Prakerin.description: Represents a student's on-the-job training (Prakerin/PKL) placement.

studentName.description: The full name of the student.

companyName.description: The name of the company where the student is placed.

startDate.description: The start date of the internship.

endDate.description: The end date of the internship.

status.description: The current status of the internship.

PortfolioItem.title: PortfolioItem
PortfolioItem.description: Represents a single item in a student's digital portfolio.

title.description: The title of the portfolio project.

description.description: A detailed description of the project.

imageUrl.description: URL of an image or screenshot of the project.

projectUrl.description: URL to the live project, repository, or video (optional).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the portfolio item was added.

ERapor.title: ERapor
ERapor.description: Represents a student's digital report card for a specific semester.

studentId.description: Reference to the User ID of the student.

className.description: The class of the student for this report (e.g., 'X TKJ 1').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the report was created.

Grade.title: Grade
Grade.description: Represents a single subject's grade within an E-Rapor.

score.description: The final numerical score for the subject.

description.description: A qualitative description of the student's competency.

AttendanceRecord.title: AttendanceRecord
AttendanceRecord.description: Represents a single attendance record for a student on a specific date.

studentName.description: The name of the student (for easier display).

date.description: The date of the attendance record.

definition.description: Stores user profile information, including their role.
Stores a student's individual portfolio items.

Stores information about the school's facilities.
Stores images and videos for the school's public gallery.
Stores student achievements.
Stores alumni testimonials.
Stores extracurricular activities.
Stores entries from the public digital guestbook.
Stores school agenda and events.
Stores files available for download.
Stores class schedule information.
Stores the school's digital library catalog.
Stores OSIS corner posts.
Stores information about the school's industry partners.
Stores information about teachers and staff.
Stores the school's alumni database.
Stores job vacancies for the BKK (Bursa Kerja Khusus).
Stores products for the Teaching Factory showcase.
Stores LSP certification schemas.
Stores responses from the alumni tracer study.
Stores student graduation statuses.
Stores student on-the-job training (Prakerin/PKL) placements.
Stores student digital report cards.
Stores individual subject grades for a report card.
Stores student attendance records.
